mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_order(order_no, user_id, flight_id, status, ticket_amount, airport_fee, fuel_fee, service_fee, total_amount, expire_time) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{flightId}, #{status}, #{ticketAmount}, #{airportFee}, #{fuelFee}, #{serviceFee}, #{totalAmount}, #{expireTime})

INSERT INTO order_passenger(order_id, passenger_id, passenger_name, passenger_type, seat_id, seat_no, ticket_price) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{passengerId}, #{passengerName}, #{passengerType}, #{seatId}, #{seatNo}, #{ticketPrice})

INSERT INTO order_passenger(order_id, passenger_id, passenger_name, passenger_type, seat_id, seat_no, ticket_price) VALUES
(#{op.orderId}, #{op.passengerId}, #{op.passengerName}, #{op.passengerType}, #{op.seatId}, #{op.seatNo}, #{op.ticketPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, flight_id, status, ticket_amount, airport_fee, fuel_fee, service_fee, total_amount, pay_time, expire_time, admin_note, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.flight_id, f.flight_no, al.name AS airline_name, da.city AS departure_city, aa.city AS arrival_city, f.departure_time, f.arrival_time, o.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.nickname AS user_nickname, o.status, o.ticket_amount, o.airport_fee, o.fuel_fee, o.service_fee, o.total_amount, o.pay_time, o.expire_time, o.admin_note, o.created_at FROM ticket_order o JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.flight_id, f.flight_no, al.name AS airline_name, da.city AS departure_city, aa.city AS arrival_city, f.departure_time, f.arrival_time, o.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.nickname AS user_nickname, o.status, o.ticket_amount, o.airport_fee, o.fuel_fee, o.service_fee, o.total_amount, o.pay_time, o.expire_time, o.admin_note, o.created_at, op.passenger_id AS op_passenger_id, op.passenger_name AS op_passenger_name, op.passenger_type AS op_passenger_type, op.seat_id AS op_seat_id, op.seat_no AS op_seat_no, op.ticket_price AS op_ticket_price FROM ticket_order o JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN order_passenger op ON o.id = op.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ticket_order SET status = #{newStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
UPDATE ticket_order SET pay_time = #{payTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, flight_id, status, ticket_amount, airport_fee, fuel_fee, service_fee, total_amount, pay_time, expire_time, admin_note, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_order WHERE status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND expire_time < NOW()

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.flight_id, f.flight_no, al.name AS airline_name, da.city AS departure_city, aa.city AS arrival_city, f.departure_time, f.arrival_time, o.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.nickname AS user_nickname, o.status, o.ticket_amount, o.airport_fee, o.fuel_fee, o.service_fee, o.total_amount, o.pay_time, o.expire_time, o.admin_note, o.created_at FROM ticket_order o JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

where.if: AND (u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userKeyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userKeyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userKeyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userKeyword}, '%'))

AND (f.flight_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.flightKeyword}, '%') OR al.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.flightKeyword}, '%') OR da.city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.flightKeyword}, '%') OR da.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.flightKeyword}, '%') OR aa.city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.flightKeyword}, '%') OR aa.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.flightKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.flight_id, f.flight_no, al.name AS airline_name, da.city AS departure_city, aa.city AS arrival_city, f.departure_time, f.arrival_time, o.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.nickname AS user_nickname, o.status, o.ticket_amount, o.airport_fee, o.fuel_fee, o.service_fee, o.total_amount, o.pay_time, o.expire_time, o.admin_note, o.created_at FROM ticket_order o JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order o JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airline al ON f.airline_id = al.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_order SET flight_id = #{flightId}, ticket_amount = #{ticketAmount}, airport_fee = #{airportFee}, fuel_fee = #{fuelFee}, service_fee = #{serviceFee}, total_amount = #{totalAmount} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ticket_order SET admin_note = #{adminNote} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, passenger_id, passenger_name, passenger_type, seat_id, seat_no, ticket_price, created_at FROM order_passenger WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id
